# Handover Continuation — 2026-06-24

## Session Summary

## Copilot Session Summary

### What was accomplished
- Split tctbp-core.js (742→90 lines) into 4 sub-modules: git-ops, profile-io, output, gates. 100% backward compatible.
- Removed ~235 lines of dead DDRE code from tctbp-run-deploy.js (848→613).
- Fixed tctbp-run-gate.js to read TCTBP.json profile commands.
- ~15 duplicated functions removed from promote/deploy, now imported from core.
- Added developmentPolicy to TCTBP.json with file-size thresholds (250/400/600).
- Created templates/copilot-instructions.md.template for scaffolded projects.
- Vite + React + TS as default scaffold framework. 5 template files.
- Scaffold auto npm install, git remote prompt, auto-push.
- Handover continuation system: automated .tctbp/continuation/ files, resume/status detection, orient interpretation report.
- New tctbp-run-orient.js: confidence-building interpretation of continuation files.
- Agent instructions updated: handover mandates Copilot --note.

### Key decisions
- Core split via re-export hub, zero import changes.
- runBuildGate silently returns when no build configured.
- Vite via templating (CLI refuses non-empty dirs).
- Continuation fully automated; Copilot generates --note narrative.

### Gotchas
1. Trailing commas in generated JSON.
2. Terminal CWD can be stale; verify repo name in orient/handover output.
3. node --check fails on JSON; use JSON.parse.
4. Continuation files accidentally pushed to media-seeker; deleted.

### Repos
- /home/ken/Documents/development/repos/media-seeker — Vite+React+TS, on GitHub Ken24T/media-seeker.

### Next session
- Primary: Work in media-seeker.
- Secondary: TCTBP-Web improvements checkpointed back here.
